label: Periodic_Time_Interval
definition: A prototype of the repeating interval, specifying the duration of each occurrence and anchors the PeriodicTimeInterval sequence at a certain point in time.

label: Week
definition: Defines a particular week, where the sequence of the weekdays can be defined using TimeSequence. For example, one can define a week from Monday to Sunday, from Sunday to Sat, or from Tue to Mon.
